cases.prompt: 내 브라우저 쿠키 가져와서 로그인된 상태로 만들어줘

assertions.text: Imports cookies from the real Chromium browser into the headless browse session.
Opens an interactive picker UI to select which cookie domains to import.

cases.prompt: Authenticate the browser so I can QA the logged-in pages.

assertions.text: Produces an authenticated browser session via imported cookies.
Positions this step before QA-testing authenticated pages.
